ddls:
CREATE TABLE "critics" (
  "critic_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each critic */,
  "critic_name" TEXT /* Name of the critic */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the critic */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the critic */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the critic joined the platform */,
  "critic_bio_url" TEXT /* URL to the critic's biography or profile page */,
  "critic_twitter_handle" TEXT /* Twitter handle of the critic */,
  "critic_website" TEXT /* URL to the critic's personal or professional website */,
  "critic_photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the critic's profile photo */,
  "last_active_date" TEXT /* Date of the last activity by the critic */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews written by the critic */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating given by the critic across all reviews */,
  "critic_status" TEXT /* Status of the critic (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("critic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "movie_title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the movie */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the movie */,
  "producer" TEXT /* Producer of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "movie_synopsis" TEXT /* Brief summary or synopsis of the movie */,
  "movie_trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie trailer */,
  "movie_poster_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie poster */,
  "movie_tagline" TEXT /* Tagline or catchphrase of the movie */,
  "movie_budget" INTEGER /* Budget of the movie */,
  "movie_box_office" INTEGER /* Box office earnings of the movie */,
  "movie_release_date" TEXT /* Exact release date of the movie */,
  "movie_country" TEXT /* Country of production */,
  "movie_language" TEXT /* Primary language of the movie */,
  "movie_imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDb ID of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_genre FOREIGN KEY ("genre") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "critic_id" TEXT /* ID of the critic who wrote the review */,
  "movie_id" TEXT /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the critic */,
  "meter_score" TEXT /* Score on the critic meter (e.g., fresh, rotten) */,
  "review_blurb" TEXT /* Blurb summarizing the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was published */,
  "review_full_text" TEXT /* Full text of the review */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "review_tags" TEXT /* Tags or keywords associated with the review */,
  "review_views" INTEGER /* Number of views the review has received */,
  "review_likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the review has received */,
  "review_dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the review has received */,
  "review_shares" INTEGER /* Number of times the review has been shared */,
  "review_comments_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the review */,
  "review_rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., critic, audience) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_critic_id FOREIGN KEY ("critic_id") REFERENCES critics ("critic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_meter_score FOREIGN KEY ("meter_score") REFERENCES meter_scores ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_rating FOREIGN KEY ("rating") REFERENCES ratings ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of rating */,
  "rating_name" TEXT /* Name of the rating (e.g., A+, B-, 3/5) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rating */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of rating (e.g., numerical, letter grade, qualitative) */,
  "rating_scale" TEXT /* Scale of the rating (e.g., 1-10, A-F) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meter_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of score */,
  "score_name" TEXT /* Name of the score (e.g., fresh, rotten) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the score */,
  "score_threshold" INTEGER /* Numerical threshold for the score (e.g., 60 for 'fresh') */,
  "score_color" TEXT /* Color associated with the score (e.g., green for 'fresh') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "genre_icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the icon or image representing the genre */,
  "genre_parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (for hierarchical genres) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., movie enthusiast, critic, admin) */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* Short biography of the user */,
  "user_website" TEXT /* URL to the user's website */,
  "user_photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile photo */,
  "user_join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "user_last_active_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "user_total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews written by the user */,
  "user_total_feedback" INTEGER /* Total number of feedbacks provided by the user */,
  "user_total_likes" INTEGER /* Total number of likes received by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review the feedback is for */,
  "feedback_comment" TEXT /* Comment left by the user */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the feedback has received */,
  "feedback_dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the feedback has received */,
  "feedback_shares" INTEGER /* Number of times the feedback has been shared */,
  "feedback_comments_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-genre relationship */,
  "movie_id" TEXT /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "movie_genre_order" INTEGER /* Order in which the genre is listed for the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)
